SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor

Class JavaASTVisitor

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.JavaASTWalker
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.JavaASTVisitor
All Implemented Interfaces:
Visitor
Direct Known Subclasses:
ContainsStatementVisitor, CreatingASTVisitor, DeclarationProgramVariableCollector, InnerBreakAndContinueReplacer, LabelCollector, OuterBreakContinueAndReturnCollector, OuterBreakContinueAndReturnReplacer, ProgramVariableCollector, WhileLoopTransformation
public abstract class JavaASTVisitor extends JavaASTWalker implements Visitor
Extends the JavaASTWalker to use the visitor mechanism. The methods inherited by the Visitor interface are all implemented that they call the method doDefaultAction(ProgramElement) .

    walk(ProgramElement node)
    walks through the AST.

    • walk

      protected void walk(ProgramElement node)
      Description copied from class: JavaASTWalker
      walks through the AST. While keeping track of the current node
      Overrides:
      walk in class JavaASTWalker
      Parameters:
      node - the JavaProgramElement the walker is at

    • performActionOnBlockContract

      public void performActionOnBlockContract(StatementBlock oldBlock, StatementBlock newBlock)
      Description copied from interface: Visitor
      Adds block contract for new statement block to block contract of old block statement.

      performActionOnBlockContract in interface Visitor
      Parameters:
      oldBlock - the old block
      newBlock - the new block
